title: cracca glandulosa
intro: Cracca glandulosa, also known as Astragalus gummifer, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cracca glandulosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its root is also used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
